---
title: "State Maps "
format: html
---

# Creating maps
## 1 mapping policies (cep rate and NSLP spending vs child well-being variables)

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import geopandas as gpd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pathlib import Path
from matplotlib.cm import ScalarMappable
from matplotlib.colors import Normalize
import os

# -----------------------
# Paths
# -----------------------
MASTER_DIR = Path(r"..\data\derived-data")
SHP_DIR    = Path(r"..\data\raw-data\shp_file\state")

MASTER_PATH = MASTER_DIR / "master_state_with_controls.csv"
SHP_PATH    = SHP_DIR / "cb_2018_us_state_500k.shp"

# -----------------------
# Columns
# -----------------------
COL_CEP   = "cep_rate_school"
COL_DOL   = "nslp_total_dollars_per_school_age"
COL_POV   = "poverty_rate_children"
COL_INSEC = "child_food_insec_rate"
COL_INSUF = "food_insufficiency_weighted"

# -----------------------
# Load + merge
# -----------------------
master = pd.read_csv(MASTER_PATH)
master["state_name"] = master["state_name"].astype(str).str.strip().str.replace(r"\s+", " ", regex=True)

states = gpd.read_file(SHP_PATH)
states["state_name"] = states["NAME"].astype(str).str.strip().str.replace(r"\s+", " ", regex=True)

gdf = states.merge(master, on="state_name", how="left")

# Keep 50 + DC
keep = [
    "Alabama","Alaska","Arizona","Arkansas","California","Colorado","Connecticut","Delaware",
    "District of Columbia","Florida","Georgia","Hawaii","Idaho","Illinois","Indiana","Iowa",
    "Kansas","Kentucky","Louisiana","Maine","Maryland","Massachusetts","Michigan","Minnesota",
    "Mississippi","Missouri","Montana","Nebraska","Nevada","New Hampshire","New Jersey",
    "New Mexico","New York","North Carolina","North Dakota","Ohio","Oklahoma","Oregon",
    "Pennsylvania","Rhode Island","South Carolina","South Dakota","Tennessee","Texas","Utah",
    "Vermont","Virginia","Washington","West Virginia","Wisconsin","Wyoming"
]
gdf = gdf[gdf["state_name"].isin(keep)].copy()

# Make numeric
for c in [COL_CEP, COL_DOL, COL_POV, COL_INSEC, COL_INSUF]:
    gdf[c] = pd.to_numeric(gdf[c], errors="coerce")
# Divide child poverty rate by 100
gdf[COL_POV] = gdf[COL_POV] / 100

# -----------------------
# IMPORTANT: CONUS only => big maps
# -----------------------
gdf_conus = gdf[~gdf["state_name"].isin(["Alaska", "Hawaii"])].copy()

# Label source: prefer STUSPS if exists, else state_name
label_col = "STUSPS" if "STUSPS" in gdf_conus.columns else "state_name"

# ------------------------
# Set the place where outputs are stored
# ------------------------
OUTPUT_DIR = "../figures/maps"
os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

# -----------------------
# Binning + plotting helper (no big legend box)
# -----------------------
k = 5  # quantile bins

def add_state_labels(ax, g):
    # representative_point is safer than centroid (keeps point inside polygon)
    pts = g.geometry.representative_point()
    for x, y, lab in zip(pts.x, pts.y, g[label_col].astype(str)):
        ax.text(x, y, lab, fontsize=6, ha="center", va="center")

def plot_pair_big(left_col, right_col, suptitle, left_title, right_title, left_cmap, right_cmap):
    # Quantile bins for each variable (intervals used as colorbar ticklabels)
    left_bin = pd.qcut(gdf_conus[left_col], q=k, duplicates="drop")
    right_bin = pd.qcut(gdf_conus[right_col], q=k, duplicates="drop")

    left_codes = left_bin.cat.codes.replace(-1, np.nan)
    right_codes = right_bin.cat.codes.replace(-1, np.nan)

    # Interval labels
    left_labels = [
        f"{iv.left:.1f}–{iv.right:.1f}"
        for iv in left_bin.cat.categories 
    ]
    right_labels = [
        f"{iv.left:.1f}–{iv.right:.1f}"
        for iv in right_bin.cat.categories
    ]

    # Use code range for colormap
    left_norm = Normalize(vmin=0, vmax=len(left_labels)-1)
    right_norm = Normalize(vmin=0, vmax=len(right_labels)-1)

    fig, axs = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(22, 10), constrained_layout=True)

    # ----- LEFT MAP
    tmp = gdf_conus.copy()
    tmp["_z"] = left_codes
    tmp.plot(
        column="_z", ax=axs[0], cmap=left_cmap, norm=left_norm,
        edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.5,
        missing_kwds={"color":"lightgrey"}
    )
    axs[0].set_title(left_title, fontsize=14)
    axs[0].set_axis_off()
    add_state_labels(axs[0], gdf_conus)

    sm_left = ScalarMappable(norm=left_norm, cmap=left_cmap)
    sm_left.set_array([])
    cbar_left = fig.colorbar(sm_left, ax=axs[0], fraction=0.035, pad=0.01)
    cbar_left.set_ticks(range(len(left_labels)))
    cbar_left.set_ticklabels(left_labels)
    cbar_left.ax.tick_params(labelsize=8)
    cbar_left.set_label(f"{left_col} (quantile bins)", fontsize=12)

    # ----- RIGHT MAP
    tmp = gdf_conus.copy()
    tmp["_z"] = right_codes
    tmp.plot(
        column="_z", ax=axs[1], cmap=right_cmap, norm=right_norm,
        edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.5,
        missing_kwds={"color":"lightgrey"}
    )
    axs[1].set_title(right_title, fontsize=14)
    axs[1].set_axis_off()
    add_state_labels(axs[1], gdf_conus)

    sm_right = ScalarMappable(norm=right_norm, cmap=right_cmap)
    sm_right.set_array([])
    cbar_right = fig.colorbar(sm_right, ax=axs[1], fraction=0.035, pad=0.01)
    cbar_right.set_ticks(range(len(right_labels)))
    cbar_right.set_ticklabels(right_labels)
    cbar_right.ax.tick_params(labelsize=6)
    cbar_right.set_label(f"{right_col} (quantile bins)", fontsize=12)

    fig.suptitle(suptitle, fontsize=18)


    # create file names
    filename = suptitle.replace(" ", "_").replace("(", "").replace(")", "") + ".png"

    # save the output
    path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, filename)
    plt.savefig(path, dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")

    plt.show()

# -----------------------
# 4 big pair-figures
# -----------------------
plot_pair_big(COL_CEP, COL_POV,
              "CEP vs Child Poverty (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "CEP participation rate (%)", "Child poverty rate (%)",
              "Blues", "Reds")

plot_pair_big(COL_CEP, COL_INSEC,
              "CEP vs Child Food Insecurity (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "CEP participation rate", "Child food insecurity rate",
              "Blues", "Reds")

plot_pair_big(COL_CEP, COL_INSUF,
              "CEP vs Child Food Insufficiency (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "CEP participation rate", "Child food insecurity rate",
              "Blues", "Reds")

plot_pair_big(COL_DOL, COL_POV,
              "NSLP $ per School-Age vs Child Poverty (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "NSLP $ per school-age", "Child poverty rate",
              "Purples", "Reds")

plot_pair_big(COL_DOL, COL_INSEC,
              "NSLP $ per School-Age vs Child Food Insecurity (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "NSLP $ per school-age", "Child food insecurity rate",
              "Purples", "Reds")

plot_pair_big(COL_DOL, COL_INSUF,
              "NSLP $ per School-Age vs Child Food Insufficiency (CONUS, big maps + labels)",
              "NSLP $ per school-age", "Child food insecurity rate",
              "Purples", "Reds")
```

## 2 voting maps
